from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
from flask_login import UserMixin
from datetime import datetime

db = SQLAlchemy()

class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = db.Column(db.String(150), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = db.Column(db.String(150), nullable=False)
    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)

class Task(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)

from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
from flask_login import UserMixin
from datetime import datetime

db = SQLAlchemy()

class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = db.Column(db.String(150), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = db.Column(db.String(150), nullable=False)
    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)

class Task(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)

Here's the result of running `cat -n` on C:\Users\GIGABYTE\AppData\Local\Temp\FORGE_workspace_6c9c604b16bf4d7492489a815b4105da_kz0i53y0\app.py:
1	from flask import Flask, render_to_response, render_template, redirect, url_for, request, flash
2	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
3	from flask_login import LoginManager, login_user, login_required, logout_user, current_user
4	from werkzeug.security import generate_password_hash, check_password_hash
5	from models import db, User, Task
6	from datetime import datetime
7	
8	app = Flask(__name__)
9	app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'thisisasecretkey'
10	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///db.sqlite'
11	
12	db.init_app(app)
13	
14	login_manager = LoginManager()
15	login_manager.login_view = 'login'
16	login_manager.init_app(app)
17	
18	@login_manager.user_loader
19	def load_user(user_id):
20	    return User.query.get(int(user_id))
21	
22	@app.route('/')
23	def index():
24	    return render_template('index.html')
25	
26	@app.route('/login', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
27	def login():
28	    if request.method == 'POST':
29	        username = request.form.get('username')
30	        password = request.form.get('password')
31	        user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
32	        if user and check_password_hash(user.password, password):
33	            login_user(user)
34	            return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
35	        else:
36	            flash('Login failed. Check your username and password.')
37	    return render_template('login.html')
38	
39	@app.route('/register', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
40	def register():
41	    if request.method == 'POST':
42	        username = request.form.get('username')
43	        password = request.form.get('password')
44	        user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
45	        if user:
46	            flash('Username already exists.')
47	        else:
48	            new_user = User(username=username, password=generate_password_hash(password, method='sha256'))
49	            db.session.add(new_user)
50	            db.session.commit()
51	            return redirect(url_for('login'))
52	    return render_template('register.html')
53	
54	@app.route('/logout')
55	@login_required
56	def logout():
57	    logout_user()
58	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
59	
60	@app.route('/dashboard')
61	@login_required
62	def dashboard():
63	    tasks = Task.query.filter_by(user_id=current_user.id).all()
64	    return render_template('dashboard.html', tasks=tasks)
65	
66	@app.route('/task/create', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
67	@login_required
68	def create_task():
69	    if request.method == 'POST':
70	        title = request.form.get('title')
71	        description = request.form.get('description')
72	        priority = request.form.get('priority')
73	        due_date_str = request.form.get('due_date')
74	        due_date = None
75	        if due_date_str:
76	            due_date = datetime.strptime(due_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d')
77	        
78	        new_task = Task(title=title, description=description, priority=priority, due_date=due_date, owner=current_user)
79	        db.session.add(new_task)
80	        db.session.commit()
81	        return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
82	    return render_template('create_task.html')
83	
84	@app.route('/task/done/<int:task_id>')
85	@login_required
86	def mark_done(task_id):
87	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
88	    if task.owner != current_user:
89	        return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
90	    task.is_done = True
91	    db.session.commit()
92	    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
93	
94	@app.route('/task/delete/<int:task_id>')
95	@login_required
96	def delete_task(task_id):
97	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
98	    if task.owner != current_user:
99	        return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
100	    db.session.delete(task)
101	    db.session.commit()
102	    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))
103	
104	if __name__ == '__main__':
105	    with app.app_context():
106	        db.create_all()
107	    app.run(debug=True)

Summary: ORIGINAL_OBJECTIVE: task-management-webapp-audit

USER_CONTEXT: Develop a Flask-based task management web application with user authentication (User model) and task CRUD functionality (Task model).

TASK_TRACKING: 
- 1: Define database models (User, Task) - status: pending
- 2: Set up Flask application and authentication routes - status: pending
- 3: Implement task management routes (create, list, update) - status: pending
- 4: Create HTML templates for the UI - status: pending
- 5: Verify application functionality - status: pending

COMPLETED:
- Created `/workspace/models.py` containing `User` and `Task` SQLAlchemy models.
- Explored workspace and verified `requirements.txt`.

PENDING:
- Initialize Flask application.
- Implement authentication routes (login/register).
- Implement task management logic and UI templates.

CURRENT_STATE:
- Working Directory: `/workspace` (mapped from a temp directory in some events).
- Files: `requirements.txt`, `models.py`.

CODE_STATE:
- `models.py`: Defines `User` (id, username, password) and `Task` (id, title, description, priority, due_date, is_done, user_id).
- Dependencies: `flask_sqlalchemy`, `flask_login`.

CHANGES:
- Created `models.py` with database schema.

VERSION_CONTROL_STATUS: 
- Not a git repository.
